raw_data.details: The scheme “Maths Wizard & Spelling Genius” is implemented under the Samagra Shiksha Programme by the Secondary Education Department, Government of Uttarakhand. The scheme aims to enhance the interest of Class 5 students in Mathematics and English by organizing competitions at the school, block, district, and state levels, and by encouraging students through rewards.
raw_data.benefits: Under this scheme, to enhance the interest of Class 5 students in Mathematics and English, the Government of India organized the “Maths Wizard” and “Spelling Genius” competitions at the school, block, district, and state levels under AWP-B for the year 2023-24, wherein participating students were encouraged through rewards.
raw_data.eligibility: The applicant must be a Class 5 student of a government school in Uttarakhand.
raw_data.application_process: OfflineThe selection of beneficiaries for first, second, and third positions is done through school, block, district, and state-level competitions.
raw_data.documents_required: Documents required as per the guidelines of the competitive examination.

To know more please visit Check EligibilityUttarakhandMaths Wizard & Spelling Genius - UttarakhandCompetitionEnglishMathematicsMaths WizardSpelling GeniusStudentDetailsThe scheme “Maths Wizard & Spelling Genius” is implemented under the Samagra Shiksha Programme by the Secondary Education Department, Government of Uttarakhand. The scheme aims to enhance the interest of Class 5 students in Mathematics and English by organizing competitions at the school, block, district, and state levels, and by encouraging students through rewards. BenefitsUnder this scheme, to enhance the interest of Class 5 students in Mathematics and English, the Government of India organized the “Maths Wizard” and “Spelling Genius” competitions at the school, block, district, and state levels under AWP-B for the year 2023-24, wherein participating students were encouraged through rewards. EligibilityThe applicant must be a Class 5 student of a government school in Uttarakhand. Application ProcessOfflineThe selection of beneficiaries for first, second, and third positions is done through school, block, district, and state-level competitions. Documents RequiredDocuments required as per the guidelines of the competitive examination. Frequently Asked QuestionsWho is eligible to participate in this scheme? Students of Class 5 studying in government schools of Uttarakhand are eligible. What is the main objective of the scheme? The scheme aims to enhance students’ interest in Mathematics and English through organized competitions and reward-based encouragement. Which subjects are covered under this scheme? Mathematics and English. At what levels are the competitions organized? Competitions are organized at the school, block, district, and state levels. How are students selected as winners? First, second, and third positions are selected at each level - school, block, district, and state - based on their performance in the competitions. Is there any reward for participating students? Yes, students participating in competitions are encouraged and rewarded for their performance. Are students from private schools eligible? No, only Class 5 students from government schools of Uttarakhand are eligible. Sources And References[Guidelines (Page No. 54)](https://uk.gov.in/department92/library_file/file-30-01-2025-04-25-16.pdf)OkWas this helpful?

faqs.question: Who is eligible to participate in this scheme?
faqs.answer: Students of Class 5 studying in government schools of Uttarakhand are eligible.

faqs.question: What is the main objective of the scheme?
faqs.answer: The scheme aims to enhance students’ interest in Mathematics and English through organized competitions and reward-based encouragement.

faqs.question: Which subjects are covered under this scheme?
At what levels are the competitions organized?
faqs.answer: Competitions are organized at the school, block, district, and state levels.

faqs.question: How are students selected as winners?
faqs.answer: First, second, and third positions are selected at each level - school, block, district, and state - based on their performance in the competitions.

faqs.question: Is there any reward for participating students?
faqs.answer: Yes, students participating in competitions are encouraged and rewarded for their performance.

faqs.question: Are students from private schools eligible?
faqs.answer: No, only Class 5 students from government schools of Uttarakhand are eligible.
